title: I'fii
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Food |image= |name=I'fii |origin= |date= |race= |creator=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' |found= |type= |description= |animals= |plants= |other= |edible=[[Korsk]] |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|I remember once, my crèche-mates—P'loh and Zhul—we took one of the scrubbing korsks and put it in the communal area. It—"
"Ate all the i'fii. I remember.|Tahiri Veila and Nen Yim talk memories|}} '''I'fii''' was a [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] [[Diet/Legends|eaten]] by the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. At one [[Time/Legends|time]], future Yuuzhan Vong [[Shaper caste|shaper]] [[Nen Yim]] and [[Gender/Legends|her]] crèche-mates [[P'loh]] and [[Zhul]] stole a [[korsk]] and released it into a communal food area, whereupon the cleaning creature consumed all of the i'fii there.''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' ==Behind the scenes== I'fii was first mentioned in [[Greg Keyes]]' [[2003]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=I'fii }} [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong food]]
